tasks.label: Build & Debug KAOS Rust
tasks.command: ${workspaceFolder}/main64/build_kernel_debug.sh && qemu-img convert -O qcow2 ${workspaceFolder}/main64/kaos64_rust.img ${workspaceFolder}/main64/kaos64.qcow2 && cp ${workspaceFolder}/main64/kaos64.qcow2 "$HOME/Library/Containers/com.utmapp.UTM/Data/Documents/KAOS x64.utm/Data/kaos64.qcow2" && qemu-system-x86_64 -drive format=raw,file=${workspaceFolder}/main64/kaos64_rust.img -gdb tcp::12345 -S
